summary: Fixed QA-blocked valid-checksum event-tail load path so malformed or unknown saved DomainEvent DTOs return structured load-save rejections without mutating the current runtime. Added regression tests for unknown event kind and malformed event field, and refreshed the worker-compatible adapter declaration for the public save/load canary export.

tests_run.result: 2 test files passed; 7 tests passed, including valid-checksum unknown event-tail kind and malformed event-tail field rejection coverage.
6 test files passed; 31 tests passed. Existing warning only: MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON for tests/fixtures/deterministic-rng-worker.ts.
Node/worker hello hash 61e0ba1c matched; command/query hash d275faa4 matched; save/load hash 28074edd matched; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violation(s).

Root test command passed: architecture check, sim determinism, 13 root Vitest files/52 tests, and web Vitest 1 file/3 tests. Existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning appeared for deterministic-rng-worker.ts.

SIM-005 baseline on m1.abstract-graph-30: 3650 days, finalDay 3650, finalRevision 3650, throughput 15304 days/sec, p50 56000ns, p95 96900ns, p99 147300ns, saveByteLength 9980, save 1448800ns, load 2860000ns.
Recursive workspace typecheck passed, including @monsoon/save-format, @monsoon/sim-core, and apps/web declaration coverage.
All matched files use Prettier code style.
No THREW output. loadSaveV1 returned status rejected with original runtime hash a38362fd and reason invalid-schema at body.eventTail[0].event.kind.

decisions: Kept event-tail validation in sim-core load hydration because event-tail DomainEvent DTOs are sim-core-owned semantics, while save-format continues to validate the envelope and generic event record shape.
Unknown or malformed saved event-tail entries now map to SaveLoadRejectionReasonV1 with code invalid-schema and body.eventTail paths, preserving the current runtime on failure.
Updated apps/web/src/worker/hello-simulation-adapter.d.mts to declare runSaveLoadCanaryInWorkerCompatibleAdapter because the public MJS adapter export remains.
risks: Event-tail compatibility remains intentionally v1-only; future DomainEvent versions should add explicit migration or rejection tests before accepting new kinds.
Existing unrelated project coordination files and route files remain modified/untracked in the worktree from orchestration activity; this fix did not edit them.
requested_action: Please re-review SIM-005 in qa_reviewer thread 019ef8ff-1fe3-72d1-bf3c-fc44b3a8af37, focusing on the valid-checksum event-tail rejection contract, no-mutation behavior, and refreshed worker adapter declaration.
